calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Petitioners Xue Zhen Chen and Qiaoxin were present in pro per as Guardians Ad Litem for the minor Kai Chuan Kwan, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioners were placed under oath and testified. Baoyu Huang sworn and acts as Cantonese interpreter for the petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Vivian Xiuling Li.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
